Investigation complete. Numbers + analysis recorded in bead notes and GH #727 comment. No code merged (instrumentation reverted per ticket scope). Implication for B2 (EV-7e86): example-level targeting is the win, file-level resolver already narrow.

Design complete. Spec doc at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-19-per-mutation-spec-targeting-design.md, summary cross-posted to GH #729. Two-stage pipeline (file-level SpecResolver + new example-level ExampleFilter w/ static line-based body-token match, LRU SpecAstCache, configurable fallback). B3 needs rescoping to cover Stage 2.

Investigation complete: not a source bug. Both MCP paths (server.rb:15, info_tool.rb:209) use Evilution::VERSION constant. Old log discrepancy was env mismatch (CLI from newer local source vs MCP server from older installed gem).
Premise invalidated by EV-dhs1: no hardcoded version string in MCP code. Both paths already use Evilution::VERSION constant.
